# Aerod

**Summary**: An atmospheric dispersion model used to estimate the concentration of pollutants in the air.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] used AERMOD to predict SO2 dispersion trends in the Dammam area.
